# Can You Center This Div?

> A precision CSS centering game with a 0.0001px success threshold. Nobody has ever won.

## What is this?

An interactive web game where you drag a div element to the exact center of the screen. The success threshold is 0.0001 pixels, which is 5,000 times smaller than a single pixel. The global success count is 0 and always will be.

## Key Features

- JARVIS-style HUD with real-time deviation tracking to 6 decimal places
- Earth Scale: maps your pixel deviation to real-world distance (e.g. 3px = 3km)
- Global leaderboard with persistent scores (Neon Postgres)
- 2,500+ contextual failure quotes across 164 distance tiers
- Anti-cheat system with HMAC-signed gameplay proof
- HTTP 418 "I'm a teapot" easter egg
- Share cards with auto-generated OG images

## Tech Stack

Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Neon Postgres, Vercel, pure CSS animations

## Links

- Play: https://center-this-div.vercel.app
